# init(_:)

**Initializer**

Creates a default configuration for the given extension.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor @preconcurrency init(_ appExtension: any TranslationUIProviderExtension)
```

## Parameters

- **appExtension**: An instance of the extension that conforms to the [doc://com.apple.translationuiprovider/documentation/TranslationUIProvider/TranslationUIProviderExtension] protocol.
title: init(_:)
